final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic employee ID badge design for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: needs a photorealistic corporate ID badge aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must show both front and back sides of the badge laid out together
Subject: must include a ByteDance (字节跳动) employee ID badge (both sides)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic, well-lit product-shot atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic physical card material treatment — exact surface finish and lanyard detail is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动" and "ByteDance"
Constraints: must preserve both front and back faces visible in one image; must read as a real corporate staff badge
Avoid:
